name: @yousolution/node-red-contrib-you-ftp-sftp
description: A node-red node that support FTP and SFTP file transfer using $() environment variables to control the ftp connection details

scripts.update: npm pack && mv yousolution-node-red-contrib-you-ftp-sftp-$npm_package_version.tgz ./data && cd data && npm i yousolution-node-red-contrib-you-ftp-sftp-$npm_package_version.tgz && docker-compose restart
scripts.sftp:keygen: mkdir -p sftp/keys && ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -m PEM -N "" -f sftp/keys/id_rsa
scripts.sftp:keygen:force: rm -f sftp/keys/id_rsa sftp/keys/id_rsa.pub && npm run sftp:keygen

author: Andrea Trentin [YouSolution]
